summary: Enhanced Zone Hover Tooltip testing COMPLETE on /daily-sessions page. All 10 tooltip features verified working: color header bar, zone code with icon badge, zone name, category with color, area (م²), max capacity (مصلي), utilization bar with percentage, zone status (نشطة/مزالة), daily note, and professional design. All 4 tabs and zones-below-map also verified working.

tooltip_color_header_bar.details: h-1.5 div with zone fill_color (rgb(34, 197, 94)) displays correctly at top of tooltip

tooltip_zone_code_icon_badge.details: w-7 h-7 rounded-md badge with zone type icon ('M') and zone fill_color background

tooltip_zone_code.details: Zone code 'TEST-ZONE-1' displayed in font-bold text-sm

tooltip_zone_name.details: Zone name 'منطقة اختبار للتحقق' displayed in text-xs font-medium

tooltip_category_with_color.details: Category 'مصلى رجال' displayed with category color (rgb(34, 197, 94))

tooltip_area_display.details: Area '50 م²' displayed when area_sqm > 0, with blue icon badge

tooltip_max_capacity.details: Max capacity '63 مصلي' displayed when max_capacity > 0, with amber icon badge

tooltip_utilization_bar.details: Utilization bar (h-1.5 with bg-slate-100) shown when current_count > 0, displays 32% with density color

tooltip_zone_status.details: Zone status 'نشطة' (Active) displayed with green dot indicator

tooltip_daily_note.details: Daily note 'ملاحظة تجريبية للمنطقة' displayed in bg-slate-50 box with border-r-2

tooltip_design.details: Professional design verified: bg-white/97, backdrop-blur-md, rounded-xl, shadow-2xl, border, overflow-hidden, min-w-[240px]

four_tabs_working.details: All 4 tabs (Map, Changes, Density, Stats) clickable and functional

zones_below_map.details: Zones list below map (data-testid='zones-below-map') visible and working

tooltip_follows_mouse.details: Tooltip position follows mouse via tooltipPos state

tooltip_pointer_events_none.details: Tooltip has pointer-events-none class, doesn't interfere with map interaction

critical_code_review_comments: Enhanced tooltip implementation at lines 1244-1318 is well structured
getDensityLevel function correctly colors utilization bar based on capacity thresholds
Tooltip correctly shows all data conditionally (area only if > 0, utilization only if current_count > 0)
Change badge displays correctly when zone has change_type !== 'unchanged'
seed_data_creation: Added daily note 'ملاحظة تجريبية للمنطقة' to TEST-ZONE-1 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified the enhanced zone hover tooltip on /daily-sessions. Key data-testids: zone-hover-tooltip, session-zone-{id}. TEST-ZONE-1 on basement floor (Feb 18, 2026 session) has: area_sqm=50, max_capacity=63, current_count=20 (32% utilization), daily_note='ملاحظة تجريبية للمنطقة'. All 4 tabs (map, changes, density, stats) are working. Tooltip design includes backdrop-blur-md, shadow-2xl, and color header bar matching zone fill_color.
